task_completion.description: Select the Induction Loop (E1) detector tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: The E1 detector (induction loop) option should be selected in the additionals or elements panel on the left side of the screen.
The text 'new_detector_1' should be visible in the 'id' input field within the detector configuration panel.
The value '300' should be entered in the 'freq' or frequency input field in the detector configuration panel.
The text 'new_detector_output.xml' should be entered in the 'file' or output file input field in the detector configuration panel.

task_completion.description: Place the detector on a lane in the network
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new E1 detector (typically represented as a short line or box) should appear placed on one of the lanes in the main network map canvas.
The 'Save Additionals' option should be clicked in the File menu, or a save dialog specifically for the additionals XML file should be visible and confirmed.

integrity.description: Agent used the network editor GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a graphical network editor (like SUMO Netedit), not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by editing the XML file directly in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent opening the .add.xml file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually type the XML tags.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the map canvas to place the detector
integrity.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor should be seen interacting with the actual road network canvas to place the detector, rather than just filling out a form without placing it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding an Induction Loop (E1) detector. The target parameters are: ID = 'new_detector_1', frequency (freq) = '300', and output file (file) = 'new_detector_output.xml'. These values must be exactly matched in the configuration fields.
